meta-description: Learn about eligibility assessments by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Eligibility assessment
excerpt: In certain states, the Marketplace doesn't provide the final decision on Medicaid eligibility. Instead, the Marketplace conducts an assessment and passes the application to the State Medicaid agency to conduct a final eligibility determination.
content: In certain states, the Marketplace doesn't provide the final decision on Medicaid eligibility. Instead, the Marketplace conducts an assessment and passes the application to the State Medicaid agency to conduct a final eligibility determination.
